import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { AccountService } from './_services'; import { Account, Role } from './_models'; @Component({ selector: 'app-root', templateUrl: 'app.component.html', standalone: false }) export class AppComponent { Role = Role; account?: Account | null; constructor(private accountService: AccountService) { this.accountService.account.subscribe(x => this.account = x); } logout() { this.accountService.logout(); } }
